name: agent-memory-development
description: Development practices and patterns for agent-memory codebase

go_conventions.error_handling: Use fmt.Errorf("module: operation: %w", err) pattern for error wrapping
go_conventions.context_propagation: Always pass ctx context.Context as first parameter to functions
go_conventions.logging: Use internal/logger package for structured logging
go_conventions.config: Use internal/config for all configuration with env struct tags

memory_processing.processor: Implement processor in internal/memory/processor.go using LLM provider interface
memory_processing.skip_processing: Always provide skip_processing option for raw storage

api_design.status_codes: Use http.StatusOK, http.StatusBadRequest, etc. (not numeric codes)
api_design.json_responses: Return JSON responses with proper error wrapping
api_design.pagination: Use PaginatedResponse type for list endpoints

vector_providers.implementations: Implement in providers.go, one type per provider
vector_providers.stubs: Weaviate, Chroma, Milvus, Elastic, Vespa, Redis, Mongo, Pgvector

templates.context_first: func method(ctx context.Context, arg1 type1, arg2 type2) error
